classes.name: Country
classes.label: Country
classes.description: A nation with its own government, occupying a particular territory.

classes.name: Organization
classes.label: Organization
classes.description: A structured group of people with a common purpose.

classes.name: Facility
classes.label: Facility
classes.description: A place, amenity, or piece of equipment provided for a particular purpose.

classes.name: NewsAgency
classes.label: News Agency
classes.description: An organization that gathers and distributes news reports.

classes.name: GovernmentOrganization
classes.label: Government Organization
classes.description: An organization that is part of a government.

classes.name: MilitaryOrganization
classes.label: Military Organization
classes.description: An organization that is part of a country's military.

classes.name: PoliticalEntity
classes.label: Political Entity
classes.description: An entity that plays a role in political affairs.
